titleStmt.title: SII 9.566: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 566. (A.R. No. 10 of 1904.) ON THE WESTERN BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1456, Jaya, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 12, Bu[dhavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1534 July 22, Wednesday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Gandhada Tippaseṭṭi made a gift of gold for the worship of the Āḷvārs, 13 in number, including Tirukachinambiyāḷvār, consecrated by himself. The gift was made for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvijayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1456 ṟaneya jayasaṁvacharada śrāvaṇa śu 12 bu lū śrīmatu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAcyutadēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgeyiUttaṁ yiralu śrīviṭhaladēvara
stānadalu Āvaraṇada Oḷage baḍagaṇa bhāgadalu kaṭṭi Idda nālku Aṁkaṇadoḷage vāṇijyavaiśyanagarada śeṭyaṇadaruśigōtrada Adhikāriya tippiseṭṭira maga gaṁdhada tippiseṭṭiyaru Accutarāyamahārāyarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkū Eṁ
du pratiṣṭheya māḍida Āḷvāra dēvaru 12 tirukacinaṁbiyāḷvāru 1 Ubhayaṁ dēvaru hadimūṟu dēvarige nityadīpārādhane naivēdya hūvina daṁḍeyū śrīviṭhaladēvara Amrutapaḍiya kaṭṭaḷeya voḷage saluva kaṭṭaḷegāgi śrīviṭhaladēvara bhaṁḍārake pulivaṭe Āgi sama
rpisida rokka varaha ga 100 ṟu varahaṁnu koṭṭu dēvara guḍiyalū māḍisida puliveṭṭu kaṭṭaḷe dina 1 lu saluva kaṭaḷe Akki paḍi hadimūṟu paḍige saluva prasāda baṭṭalu 36 dīpārādhanege yeṁṇe paḍi voṁdū Akki hūvina daṁḍe 13 Ikaṭṭaḷe pramāṇinalu dēvastānadalū naḍasu
dharmake Āru tapidarū śrīviṭhaladēvara pādakke tapidavaru . gōhatya bra(ṁ)hmahatya mahāpātakava māḍida pāpake pōgaluḷavaru . śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.566 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
